He is a member of household HH-0009 (dwelling DWL-0217), established on 1990-09-02, headed by Rogers Nansubuga. He holds the household relation: sibling. He entered the surveillance system on 2003-03-24 via in migration. The observation window spans from 2003-03-24 to 2020-11-04. He is recorded as a permanent resident. He was involved in a internal return migration to Bugembe. This was a permanent or long-term move. The move took place on 2003-03-24. The stated reason for movement was insecurity. The destination place is recorded as Kampala, Uganda (place code: PLC-040). He exited the cohort on 2020-04-11 due to loss to followup. The most recent observation (OBS-2020-28) was a exit event. Data was collected by fieldworker Annet Tumwine (FW-003). Additional notes: Recorded during exit visit in 2020.
